description: PFD-aligned action playbook. Edit entries without code changes; referenced in LLM prompts for alert generation.

actions: Contact your top US supplier this week to ask about locking in current pricing for 60–90 days.
Review open USD-denominated invoices and consider accelerating payment before further CAD weakening.
Explore whether equivalent Canadian domestic suppliers can quote the same materials.
Map which SKUs or contracts are exposed to the affected tariff lines.
Talk to your customs broker or freight forwarder about timing of landed cost changes.
Model a 5–10% cost pass-through scenario with your finance lead.
Review inbound lead times and safety stock for affected lanes.
Ask carriers for firm quotes on the next 30 days rather than spot-only pricing.
